home.title: UEFA Champions League
home.subtitle: Draw Simulator
home.description: Simulate the official draw for the new Champions League format with 36 teams, 8 match days, and 144 matches — all generated respecting the tournament constraints.
home.teamsDesc: Divided into 4 pots based on UEFA ranking
home.matchDaysDesc: Each team plays 8 matches — 4 home, 4 away
home.drawDesc: One click to simulate the complete draw
home.drawCompletedDesc: 144 matches have been generated. Explore the results.

draw.title: Draw Management
draw.description: Execute or delete the Champions League draw.
draw.deleteDrawDesc: This will remove the current draw and all 144 matches. This action cannot be undone.
draw.noDrawStats: No draw exists yet. Execute a draw to see statistics.

matches.title: Matches
matches.description: Browse all 144 matches with filters, sorting and pagination.
matches.noMatches: No matches found. Try adjusting your filters or execute a draw first.

teams.title: Teams
teams.noMatches: No matches yet. Execute a draw first.
